prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-EXTEND-FLYSWATTER-ASSRT Product Type: PEST_CONTROL_DEVICE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Extendable Insect Bug Fly Swatter Durable Telescopic Pole Anti Slip Description: Keep those pesky insects in check with this Handheld Extending Bug Swatter.

This highly portable lightweight inspect fly swatter is great for the home, office, park, camping, sporting events and more. Simply swing the racket in the direction of any insect, once the non-toxic plastic pad makes contact with the insect, it kills the bug with pure force.

No more worrying about smelly candles or lights. Take matters into your own hands when it comes to bug defense.

This pesky insect fly swatter features a non-toxic plastic square swatting pad. It is resilient and big enough to catch the pest. It is extendable up to 28.5" and collapsible down to 10.5" making it small enough to fit in a purse, tool box, tackle box, or to store in your car. Search Terms: Camping fly swatter Home Pest Control Features: - Square Swatting Pad - Extendable up to 28.5" - Extendable Stainless Steel Pole - Anti-Slip Rubber Handle for a sturdy grip - Great for combating Mosquitoes. Flies, Gnats, Roaches and other pests === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Extendable Fly Swatter Telescopic Pole

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Extendable Bug Fly Swatter

anthropic.title_differentiation: Extends To 285 Inches, Anti-Slip Handle, Portable Collapsible Design, Kills Mosquitoes And Flies

openai.title_differentiation: Extendable To 285", Collapsible To 105", Stainless Steel Pole, Anti-Slip Grip, Square Pad, Mosquito And Fly Defense
